understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to progress through all levels of the KA59 puzzle by placing every selectable piece onto a goal tile (marked '+') simultaneously in each level, within a limited number of steps.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT, MOVE_UP, MOVE_DOWN) shift the currently selected piece by 3-pixel cells. Pushing occurs when a pushable block is adjacent in the movement direction; both the piece and block move. Walls and some boundaries block movement, causing actions to have no effect if movement is impossible. CLICK with a target_position switches control to another selectable piece at those coordinates. Heuristic hints like movement_blocked indicate adjacent objects but do not guarantee failure. The state is provided as pixel coordinates and a semantic grid (P=selected, S=other selectable, B=block, #=wall, +=goal, .=empty).
